entry.title: About me
entry.content:
Hello and thanks for reading my blog!

I have been working with VMware technologies since 2015 and I have been involved in Support Services, Education Content Development, Proffesional Services and Site Realiability Engineering and Design and Implementation. If you are interested in any of the following products and technologies, stay tuned!

  • VMware Cloud Foundation
  • VMware NSX
  • VMware VKS
  • VMware Tanzu
  • Linux
  • Proxmox
  • Virtualization
  • Cyber Security
  • Exam guides

  • Event blogs

    My old blog: https://vstuff.home.blog/
entry.summary: Hello and thanks for reading my blog!
